Perfect for cozy, animal, or casual streetwear avatars

items.name: [BOY] Blocky Y2K Shorts + Black Sneakers
items.description:
Rock a clean Y2K street look with these blocky layered shorts, built to give your avatar that bold, classic Roblox silhouette 🧍‍♂️🔥 The structured fit keeps things sharp and stylish while still feeling casual and easy to wear. Built right into the shorts are sleek black shoes, giving the whole piece a finished, ready-to-go vibe 👟🖤

The shoes add a solid, grounded feel that balances perfectly with the chunky shorts design, making your outfit look put-together from top to bottom 😎✨ Whether you’re chilling with friends, roleplaying, or showing off your fit in-game, this combo delivers effortless style without overdoing it 💥

Perfect for streetwear, Y2K-inspired outfits, and everyday looks — simple, confident, and made to stand out

items.name: Cap
items.description:
🧢 Classic Cap – Clean Style for Every Roblox Avatar

The Classic Cap is a must-have accessory for players who want a simple, cool, and timeless look. Designed to fit perfectly on any avatar, this cap adds instant style without being too flashy.

With its smooth shape and clean details, the cap works great with casual outfits, streetwear, and even competitive game looks. It’s lightweight, stylish, and perfect for everyday Roblox adventures.

⭐ Why this Cap is worth it:

🧢 Clean & Simple Design – Always looks good

👌 Perfect Fit – Comfortable on most avatars

🎮 Great for Any Game – From PvP to roleplay

🔥 Timeless Style – Never goes out of fashion

This cap isn’t just an accessory — it’s a style essential. If you want your avatar to look confident, relaxed, and modern, this cap is the right choice.

👉 Wear the Classic Cap and complete your Roblox look today!
